About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows EACO (#1 ranked) displaying exceptional long-term momentum with a 1,955% 10-year return and a dominant score of 94.0, though this appears to be an extreme outlier rather than a typical market leader. The stock passes all four ratio tests (acceleration thresholds) and trades above all major moving averages, indicating sustained uptrend conditions. In contrast, MPC (#2 ranked) shows more conventional but still strong performance with 658% over 10 years and a perfect 5-of-5 ratio passes, suggesting steadier acceleration across timeframes. EACO's extraordinary relative outperformance versus SPY (1,703% vs typical market gains) combined with very low correlations to major sector ETFs (mostly negative) suggests it may operate in a niche or specialized sector disconnected from broad market movements. Both leaders maintain healthy positioning above their long-term moving averages, but EACO's extreme metrics warrant careful due diligence regarding concentration risk and sustainability.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
